name: Hecahands Dandalos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ダンダロス
desc:
2 "Hecahands" monsters
You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it. You can only use this effect of "Hecahands Dandalos" once per turn. Your "Hecahands" Fusion Monsters and your monsters that are owned by your opponent can attack directly. If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle.
